caption: A man wearing a distinctive, tall, spiky grey wig, glasses, and over-ear headphones sits in a studio setting. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt with a red bow tie and light-colored suspenders. A professional microphone on a boom arm is positioned in front of him. The background features a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and clothing racks. To his left, a red and white logo reads "BOSS TALK 101" with "PODCAST" written underneath. Across the sequence, the man is speaking, his facial expression shifting slightly as he talks. In the second frame, a woman in a black top is partially visible behind him. By the final frame, the man's head is tilted slightly downward, and his right hand moves into the lower foreground. The lighting remains consistent throughout the scene.
